title: Configure Multi-Window and Tab Support
description: Enable macOS multi-window support so users can open multiple Rick Terminal windows. Also implement a tab bar within windows for multiple terminal sessions or files. Use WindowGroup and native macOS tab APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Cmd+T opens new tab within window
Tab switching works with keyboard shortcuts
Window state restored on app restart
agent_output: Ik heb volledige multi-window en tab support geïmplementeerd voor Rick Terminal met native macOS integratie:
